prompt: Create src/domains/ui/dialogue_screen.rs and add 'pub mod dialogue_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register DialogueScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs for ScreenEntity, MenuButton, ButtonAction, color constants, despawn_screen. Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs for AppState. Read src/shared/mod.rs for DialogueTree, DialogueNode, DialogueResponse, DialogueCondition, NpcId, NpcPlacement. Read src/domains/dialogue/mod.rs for the dialogue domain API. Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_dialogue_trees() to see tree structure. Create DialogueScreenPlugin: needs a new AppState::Dialogue variant — add it to app_state.rs. Also add CurrentNpc(NpcId) resource to app_state.rs. OnEnter reads CurrentNpc, finds the dialogue tree from starter_dialogue_trees(), shows the root node text in a JRPG panel with speaker name at top. Below text, show response buttons for each DialogueResponse. Click a response → advance to next node (or apply side effects: GiveGold, UnlockMapNode, Heal, SetQuestStage, StartBattle, AddDjinnToParty — read the DialogueResponse side_effects enum from shared). When dialogue ends (no next_node), transition back to AppState::Town. Use PANEL_BG, TEXT_COLOR, BORDER_COLOR from ui_helpers. OnExit despawn_screen + remove CurrentNpc. Run cargo check. Commit.

Create src/domains/ui/dungeon_screen.rs and add 'pub mod dungeon_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register DungeonScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/shared/mod.rs for DungeonDef, RoomDef, RoomType, RoomExit, RoomItem, PuzzleDef, PuzzleType, EncounterSlot, DungeonId, RoomId. Read src/domains/dungeon/mod.rs for DungeonState, enter_dungeon(), get_current_room(), move_to_room(), collect_item(). Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs for AppState — add Dungeon variant. Add CurrentDungeon(DungeonId) resource. Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_dungeons(). Create DungeonScreenPlugin as room-card UI: OnEnter reads CurrentDungeon, calls dungeon::enter_dungeon() to get DungeonState, shows current room as a full-screen JRPG panel with room name, room type icon text (Normal/Puzzle/Boss/Treasure/Safe), description. Show exit buttons for each RoomExit (N/S/E/W labels). Show item buttons for collectible RoomItems. Show encounter info if room has EncounterSlots. Click exit → dungeon::move_to_room(), refresh panel. Click item → dungeon::collect_item(), update GameStateRes dungeon_collected_items. Boss room encounter → build battle, transition to InBattle. Track visited rooms in DungeonState. Leave dungeon button → transition to WorldMap. OnExit despawn_screen + remove CurrentDungeon. Run cargo check. Commit.

Create src/domains/ui/puzzle_screen.rs and add 'pub mod puzzle_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register PuzzleScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/shared/mod.rs for PuzzleDef, PuzzleType (PushBlock, ElementPillar, DjinnPuzzle, SwitchSequence, IceSlide). Read src/domains/puzzle/mod.rs for puzzle solving API. Create PuzzleScreenPlugin: add AppState::Puzzle variant to app_state.rs. Add CurrentPuzzle(PuzzleDef) resource. OnEnter shows puzzle type name and description in a JRPG panel. For PushBlock: show 4 direction buttons (N/S/E/W), player must push in correct sequence. For ElementPillar(element): show element name, player clicks 'Activate' button (auto-solve if party has matching element djinn). For DjinnPuzzle(djinn_id): check if party has the required djinn, show success/fail. For SwitchSequence: show numbered switches as buttons, player clicks in order. For IceSlide: show direction buttons for sliding. Call puzzle domain logic for validation. On solve → give reward, return to dungeon room. On fail → show 'Try again' or return. OnExit despawn_screen. Run cargo check. Commit.
